$description: Component tokens for Input fields with multiple variants including text input, password, dropdown/select, date/time pickers, phone input, and tag input. Supports default and destructive (error) states across 6 sizes. Figma Reference: Node ID 26683-37578

$component.name: Input
$component.description: A foundational form component for user text input, with support for various input types and states. Includes features like leading/trailing addons, prefix/suffix text, icons, validation states, and character counting.
$component.structure: Container with border, optional leading addon/icon, input text field, optional trailing icon/suffix, with focus states and validation feedback

sizes.3xs: 24px height - Minimal size for very compact layouts
sizes.2xs: 28px height - Extra small for dense forms
sizes.xs: 32px height - Small size for compact interfaces
sizes.sm: 36px height - Standard small size for most forms
sizes.lg: 44px height - Large size for prominent inputs

variants.default: Standard input with neutral colors for normal data entry
variants.destructive: Error state with red/error colors for validation feedback
variants.types: text, password (with toggle), dropdown/select, date picker, time picker, phone input, tag input, leading text, trailing button/dropdown

usage.contexts: Forms, search bars, filters, login screens, settings panels, data entry interfaces
usage.features: Leading addon (labels like 'https://'), Prefix (symbols like '$'), Suffix (units like 'kg'), Dropdown chevron, Character counter, Password toggle icon

xs.description: Input border radius for xs size - 4px

md.description: Input border radius for md size - 8px

lg.description: Input border radius for lg size - 8px
